properties.name: review.generation.thread-pool-size
properties.description: Number of threads allocated for processing.

properties.name: review.generation.max-queue-size
properties.description: Maximum size of the executor queue.

properties.name: review.generation.preferred-domains
properties.description: List of preferred domains to fetch content from.

properties.name: review.generation.preferred-domains-by-vertical
properties.description: Optional vertical-specific preferred domains. When a vertical has a non-empty entry, it replaces the global preferred-domain list for SERP boosting and result ordering.

properties.name: review.generation.weak-search-brands
properties.description: Weak catalog brand labels that allow offer/title evidence to promote a stronger brand and model for review-source search.

properties.name: review.generation.official-url-excluded-domains
properties.description: Domain substrings excluded from manufacturer official URL detection.

properties.name: review.generation.brand-aliases
properties.description: Sibling-brand aliases used when judging whether a source belongs to the same manufacturer group.

properties.name: review.generation.query-template
properties.description: Template for constructing search queries.

properties.name: review.generation.search-results-per-query
properties.description: Number of Google Custom Search results requested for each review-source query.

properties.name: review.generation.search-language-restrict
properties.description: Google Custom Search language restriction used for review-source discovery.

properties.name: review.generation.search-country-restrict
properties.description: Google Custom Search country restriction used for review-source discovery.

properties.name: review.generation.search-geo-location
properties.description: Google Custom Search geo-location hint used for review-source discovery.

properties.name: review.generation.search-host-language
properties.description: Google Custom Search host language used for review-source discovery.

properties.name: review.generation.search-safe
properties.description: Google Custom Search safe-search mode used for review-source discovery.

properties.name: review.generation.serp-budget
properties.description: Total SERP query budget shared by all phases.

properties.name: review.generation.partial-retry-max-search
properties.description: Extra targeted searches allowed when the first fetch pass collected official product evidence but did not reach source or token thresholds.

properties.name: review.generation.low-quality-fallback-max-search
properties.description: Extra GTIN/model fallback searches allowed when accepted source quality is too low.

properties.name: review.generation.min-global-tokens
properties.description: Minimum global token count required for a successful review evidence fetch.

properties.name: review.generation.min-url-count
properties.description: Minimum accepted URL count required for a successful review evidence fetch.

properties.name: review.generation.fetch-thresholds-by-vertical
properties.description: Vertical-specific thresholds used to classify fetched review evidence as complete, partial, or failed.

properties.name: review.generation.max-total-tokens
properties.description: Maximum total number of tokens allowed for aggregation.

properties.name: review.generation.min-markdown-chars
properties.description: Minimum number of markdown characters required before a fetched page is considered usable.

properties.name: review.generation.source-min-tokens
properties.description: Minimum number of tokens required for a source to be considered.

properties.name: review.generation.source-max-tokens
properties.description: Maximum number of tokens allowed per source.

properties.name: review.generation.max-urls-per-product
properties.description: Maximum URLs to fetch per product in the retrieval pipeline.

properties.name: review.generation.facts-max-stored
properties.description: Maximum number of stored facts per product.

properties.name: review.generation.fact-max-markdown-chars
properties.description: Maximum markdown size per stored fact.

properties.name: review.generation.markdown-line-removal-patterns
properties.description: Regex patterns applied line by line to remove header, footer, cookie, newsletter, and other markdown noise before token counting.

properties.name: review.generation.max-concurrent-fetch
properties.description: Maximum number of concurrent URL fetch operations.

properties.name: review.generation.refresh-delay-months
properties.description: Delay in months after which an existing AI review is considered outdated.

properties.name: review.generation.estimated-time
properties.description: Estimated time for review generation process. Used to compute remaining time.

properties.name: review.generation.regeneration-delay-days
properties.description: Delay in days after which a successful AI review is considered outdated and can be regenerated.

properties.name: review.generation.retry-delay-days
properties.description: Delay in days after which an unsuccessful AI review generation (insufficient data) can be retried.

properties.name: review.generation.prompt-key
properties.description: Prompt key used for external-source review generation.

properties.name: review.generation.batch-poll-interval
properties.description: Interval between batch status scans for review generation jobs.

properties.name: review.generation.batch-schedule-cron
properties.description: Cron expression for scheduled batch review generation.

properties.name: review.generation.batch-schedule-size
properties.description: Number of products to include in scheduled batch review generation.

properties.name: review.generation.attribute-extraction-prompt-key
properties.description: Prompt key used for the first LLM phase (attribute extraction) when two-phase generation is enabled.

properties.name: review.generation.two-phase-generation
properties.description: When true, EXTERNAL_SOURCES generation runs two sequential LLM calls: phase 1 extracts attributes, phase 2 generates review text. Grounded mode is always single-call.

properties.name: review.generation.status-map-ttl-hours
properties.description: TTL in hours for completed process status entries in the in-memory status map. Entries older than this are evicted by the hourly cleanup task.

properties.name: review.generation.url-cache-max-size
properties.description: Maximum number of entries in the URL resolution LRU cache.

properties.name: dataforseo.serp.username
properties.description: DataForSEO API username used for Standard SERP task submission.

properties.name: dataforseo.serp.password
properties.description: DataForSEO API password used for Standard SERP task submission.

properties.name: dataforseo.serp.base-url
properties.description: DataForSEO API base URL.

properties.name: dataforseo.serp.language-code
properties.description: SERP language code.

properties.name: dataforseo.serp.location-name
properties.description: SERP location name.

properties.name: dataforseo.serp.se-domain
properties.description: Search engine domain.

properties.name: dataforseo.serp.device
properties.description: SERP device.

properties.name: dataforseo.serp.priority
properties.description: DataForSEO task priority.

properties.name: dataforseo.serp.depth
properties.description: SERP depth requested from DataForSEO. Keep at 10 for v1 cost control.

properties.name: dataforseo.serp.max-stored-urls
properties.description: Maximum source URLs retained per product after discovery and deduplication.

properties.name: dataforseo.serp.max-tasks-per-post
properties.description: Maximum DataForSEO tasks submitted per task_post request.

properties.name: dataforseo.serp.discovery-poll-interval
properties.description: Delay between scheduled polls of local DataForSEO discovery jobs.

properties.name: dataforseo.serp.default-query-template
properties.description: Default product query template. Arguments are brand and model.
properties.defaultValue: %s "%s" ("fiche technique" OR caractéristiques OR test OR guide OR comparatif)
